# User Guide

This guide was generated automatically from live screenshots of the application.

## Empty todo list — no items added yet

**Getting Started with Todos**

You're looking at your todo list, which is currently empty. Type a task into the "What needs to be done?" field and click **Add** to create your first todo item.

![Empty todo list — no items added yet](/screenshots/empty-state.png)

## Adding a new todo item

**Todo List Application**

The Todos page displays your current tasks along with a count of remaining items. You can add new tasks by typing in the "What needs to be done?" input field and clicking **Add**, or mark existing tasks as complete using the checkbox, and remove them with the **×** button.

![Adding a new todo item](/screenshots/add-todo.png)

## List with multiple todo items

**Todo List**
This screen displays your list of tasks, showing 4 remaining items to complete. You can add new todos by typing in the input field and clicking **Add**, mark tasks as complete using the checkboxes, or remove individual items by clicking the **×** button.

![List with multiple todo items](/screenshots/multiple-todos.png)

## Marking a todo item as completed

**Completing a Todo Item**

Check the checkbox next to any todo item to mark it as completed — the item will appear with a strikethrough and a filled checkbox to indicate it's done. The remaining count at the top automatically updates to reflect how many items are still pending.

![Marking a todo item as completed](/screenshots/completed-item.png)
